description: Joining Cloudflare's Lisbon office for a summer internship as a Software Engineer. I'll be working on improving cloudflare user and developer experience by building tools and features that enhance the usability and functionality of Cloudflare's services. This opportunity will allow me to gain hands-on experience in a leading tech company and contribute to projects that impact millions of users worldwide.

Developing a UX report for the VAXPRED platform, a tool designed to predict vaccine efficacy. This project involves analyzing user interactions and feedback to enhance the platform's usability and effectiveness in delivering critical health information.
Developing open-source tools for the student community. Currently contributing to the core website (SvelteKit), the UNI mobile app (Flutter), and a scheduler builder for UP students (React).
Developing open-source tools for the student community. Currently contributing to the core website (SvelteKit), the UNI mobile app (Flutter), and a scheduler builder for UP students (React).
Part-time role working on retail software solutions for major clients like SONAE. Engineered robust PHP microservices for backend operations and maintained Android systems for in-store deployments.

Full-time summer internship continuing development on [[Dodia.pt|https://dodia.pt|/work/dodia]] and the agency's own website. Marked my first professional deep dive into Svelte, refining UI interactions and performance.

Curricular internship where I built [[Dodia.pt|https://dodia.pt|/work/dodia]] from the ground up. Architected the full-stack solution using Next.js and Drizzle ORM, delivering my first production-grade application.
